# B2B: Zype integration webhook

: Saksham Srivastava
Created time: June 11, 2024 1:31 PM
Status: Not started
Last edited: August 12, 2024 8:25 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

In addition to current webhooks, create another webhook for partner platforms to get an understanding of when was withdrawal initiated by a user on their platform. 

**Note:** While this requirement was raised by zype this webhook will be created for the complete SDK, any partner can choose to consume it.

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

[Zype requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10JFkmvOK9p_OitcO9aeHiExm4I4hAxwCQZg4tgxfTCg/edit?usp=sharing)

## User stories / User flow

## Requirements

New webhook for withdrawal initiated:

1. WITHDRAWAL_INITIATED: This will be triggered for all withdrawals (first and subsequent)
    
    Data required: 
    
    1. withdrawal_amount
    2. transfer_date
    3. bank_name
    4. account_last4digits
